reasoning: The knowledge cutoff is late October 2025, leaving just over 2 months in the year. Importantly, there are no reports of an invasion having occurred between the start of the timeframe (May 28) and October 26. While Russia has engaged in military signaling and threatening rhetoric near Finland, a direct invasion of a NATO ally would be an extraordinary escalation triggering Article 5, which Russia is unlikely to undertake while already engaged in Ukraine. Barring an incredibly drastic "grey zone" action that meets the specific resolution criteria (intended to establish de facto control over territory), the probability of an invasion commencing before the end of the year is exceptionally low. Thus, I estimate a 2% chance, which also perfectly aligns with the Polymarket price of 2%.
